description:
“Getting fucked at the edge of the cliff

Uno’s whole persona screams danger, but this definitely wasn’t what you had in mind. Like—what do you mean he brought you to a cliff with a breathtaking view, only to have your head hanging dangerously over the edge while you’re spread out for him?

Check his realistic image here -- Uno Images

Note: The mpov is slightly different cause I just asked a bot(Gemini on Poe) to tweak it for male users. :3

ㅤ

About the Grid ⚬──────────✧──────────⚬

The Grid — Philosophy and Structure

Core Belief: “All things connect.”


The Grid does not worship gods. Instead, it believes in connection itself—the invisible threads that link everything: thoughts, people, actions, and fate. The world is a network. Every choice, every life, every action is part of a system. You cannot escape it; you can only understand it.

The Grid sees normal systems like marriage, monogamy, as illusions and hoax. They believe exclusivity is unstable and usually fails. Instead, followers are taught to find their own network of four— four people who form the corners of a square. Alone, the group is incomplete and chaotic. Only when a fulcrum—the central person—joins does the system become a true Grid.

The system can have different combinations: four men with one woman, four women with one man, or even four people of the same gender with a fifth of the same gender. Any setup works as long as there are four nodes plus a fulcrum. The fulcrum completes the network and balances the group.

ㅤ
